name: Stewed Dog (Wedding Style)
recipeIngredient: 1 whole fresh pineapple, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully remove the skin while still warm and set aside for later use.
2. Cut meat into 1-inch cubes. Marinade meat in a mixture of vinegar, peppercorns, salt, and garlic for 2 hours.
3. Fry meat in oil using a large wok over an open fire, then add onions and chopped pineapple until tender.
4. Pour in tomato sauce and boiling water, add red pepper strips, bay leaves, and tabasco.
5. Cover and simmer over warm coals until the meat is tender. Blend in liver spread and cook for additional 5-7 minutes.
You can substitute lamb for dog. The taste is similar, but not as pungent.
Smooth liver pate will do as well.
